message:
fix(sync): preserve remote state and fix resolution tracking

- Only mark conflicts as resolved when status is actually Synced
- Preserve existing remote_hashes and remote_modified when updating
  state instead of creating new maps (fixes multi-remote data loss)
- Preserve last_modified_by field from existing state
- Use branch_override parameter in resolve_branch_name call

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
